description:
Baseline run — Bayesian linear regression prior + 3-layer PFN, 2000 steps,
batch 32. Reproduces the headline claim of Müller et al. ICLR 2022: the
trained transformer does in-context Bayesian regression in a single forward
pass, beating the mean baseline by ~100× and landing within ~1.3× of the
closed-form OLS solution.
